namespaceFolderIssues.title: Namespace/folder mismatch for module-scoped file
namespaceFolderIssues.evidence: /Users/risha/Documents/Buildathon/samples/legacy-java-app/Services/LoginService.cs namespace 'LegacyModernization.Converted.Services' does not include module token 'Login'.

diIssues.title: Missing explicit DI registration signals for module 'Login'
diIssues.evidence: Program/Startup scan did not find module-specific AddScoped/AddTransient registrations.

recommendedStructure: Modules/Login/Application for use cases and contracts
Modules/Login/Infrastructure for persistence and external adapters
Modules/Login/Web for controllers and view models
Composition root (Program/Startup) for DI wiring only
